name: Chicken Stuff
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Chicken, Cut into strips or Boneless breasts
1 can Cream of Celery Soup, Low Salt
1 can Cream of Mushroom Soup, Low Salt
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (if using a glass pan, set to 350°F).
2. Combine the soups and wine in a bowl.
3. Place chicken breasts in the baking dish. If using strips, form them into the size of the breast.
4. Optional: Add a slice of ham on top of the chicken.
5. Spread cheese evenly over the chicken.
6. Cover all with stuffing mix.
7. Pour the soup mixture over everything to moisten the stuffing.
8. Cover and bake for 35-45 minutes.
9. Serve with a Caesar Salad.
Variation: After cooking for 20 minutes, remove from oven and place broccoli florets over the stuffing. Cover and return to the oven to finish.
